title: heterotheca oregona var. rudis
intro: Heterotheca oregona var. rudis, also known as rough-leaved false goldenaster, is a plant species that belongs to the family Asteraceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can be attributed to its high content of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Heterotheca oregona var. rudis include its potential to alleviate symptoms of colds, fever, and respiratory issues, as well as its ability to support the immune system and reduce inflammation. Heterotheca oregona var. rudis can be prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, and it is often used in traditional medicine to promote relaxation and alleviate stress.
